'''√m-b-dh''' ('''mabadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quay|quay]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quay|quay]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √m-b-dh
|-
! Lemma
| mabadha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mabadhithi|mabadhithi]] || [[word:mabadhiji|mabadhiji]] || [[word:mabadhishi|mabadhishi]] || [[word:mabadhi|mabadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mabadhuthuth|mabadhuthuth]] || [[word:mabadhujuj|mabadhujuj]] || [[word:mabadhushush|mabadhushush]] || [[word:mabadh|mabadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mabadhuthu|mabadhuthu]] || [[word:mabadhuju|mabadhuju]] || [[word:mabadhushu|mabadhushu]] || [[word:mabadhu|mabadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mabadhufuth|mabadhufuth]] || [[word:mabadhufuj|mabadhufuj]] || [[word:mabadhufush|mabadhufush]] || [[word:mabadhuf|mabadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mabadhethe|mabadhethe]] || [[word:mabadheje|mabadheje]] || [[word:mabadheshe|mabadheshe]] || [[word:mabadhe|mabadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mabadhothoth|mabadhothoth]] || [[word:mabadhojoj|mabadhojoj]] || [[word:mabadhoshosh|mabadhoshosh]] || [[word:mabadh|mabadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mabadhotho|mabadhotho]] || [[word:mabadhojo|mabadhojo]] || [[word:mabadhosho|mabadhosho]] || [[word:mabadho|mabadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mabadhofoth|mabadhofoth]] || [[word:mabadhofoj|mabadhofoj]] || [[word:mabadhofosh|mabadhofosh]] || [[word:mabadhof|mabadhof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mabadhïf|mabadhïf]] || [[word:mabadhïf|mabadhïf]] || [[word:mabadhïf|mabadhïf]] || [[word:mabadhïf|mabadhïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mabadhïfïf|mabadhïfïf]] || [[word:mabadhïfïf|mabadhïfïf]] || [[word:mabadhïfïf|mabadhïfïf]] || [[word:mabadhïfïf|mabadhïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mabadhïf|mabadhïf]] || [[word:mabadhïf|mabadhïf]] || [[word:mabadhïf|mabadhïf]] || [[word:mabadhïf|mabadhïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mabadhïf|mabadhïf]] || [[word:mabadhïf|mabadhïf]] || [[word:mabadhïf|mabadhïf]] || [[word:mabadhïf|mabadhïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mabadhæthæ|mabadhæthæ]] || [[word:mabadhæjæ|mabadhæjæ]] || [[word:mabadhæshæ|mabadhæshæ]] || [[word:mabadhæ|mabadhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mabadhathath|mabadhathath]] || [[word:mabadhajaj|mabadhajaj]] || [[word:mabadhashash|mabadhashash]] || [[word:mabadh|mabadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mabadhatha|mabadhatha]] || [[word:mabadhaja|mabadhaja]] || [[word:mabadhasha|mabadhasha]] || [[word:mabadha|mabadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mabadhafath|mabadhafath]] || [[word:mabadhafaj|mabadhafaj]] || [[word:mabadhafash|mabadhafash]] || [[word:mabadhaf|mabadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:mabadhasha|mabadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomabadhasha|gomabadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimabadhasha|gokimabadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:mabadhnüsha|mabadhnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomabadhnknüsha|gomabadhnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimabadhnüsha|gokimabadhnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mabadhshësha|mabadhshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomabadhnkshësha|gomabadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimabadhshësha|gokimabadhshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mabadhrosha|mabadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomabadhnkrosha|gomabadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimabadhrosha|gokimabadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mabadhmusha|mabadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomabadhnkmusha|gomabadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimabadhmusha|gokimabadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:mabadhsherasha|mabadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomabadhnksherasha|gomabadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimabadhsherasha|gokimabadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:mabadhngasha|mabadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomabadhnkngasha|gomabadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimabadhngasha|gokimabadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mabadhyasha|mabadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomabadhnkyasha|gomabadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimabadhyasha|gokimabadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:mabadhyamasha|mabadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomabadhnkyamasha|gomabadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimabadhyamasha|gokimabadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:mabadhnüshësha|mabadhnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomabadhnknüshësha|gomabadhnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimabadhnüshësha|gokimabadhnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mabadhnürosha|mabadhnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomabadhnknürosha|gomabadhnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimabadhnürosha|gokimabadhnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mabadhnümusha|mabadhnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomabadhnknümusha|gomabadhnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimabadhnümusha|gokimabadhnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:mabadhshënüsha|mabadhshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomabadhnkshënüsha|gomabadhnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimabadhshënüsha|gokimabadhshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mabadhshërosha|mabadhshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomabadhnkshërosha|gomabadhnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimabadhshërosha|gokimabadhshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mabadhshëmusha|mabadhshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomabadhnkshëmusha|gomabadhnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimabadhshëmusha|gokimabadhshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:mabadhronüsha|mabadhronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomabadhnkronüsha|gomabadhnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimabadhronüsha|gokimabadhronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:mabadhroshësha|mabadhroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomabadhnkroshësha|gomabadhnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimabadhroshësha|gokimabadhroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mabadhromusha|mabadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomabadhnkromusha|gomabadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimabadhromusha|gokimabadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:mabadhmunüsha|mabadhmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomabadhnkmunüsha|gomabadhnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimabadhmunüsha|gokimabadhmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:mabadhmushësha|mabadhmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomabadhnkmushësha|gomabadhnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimabadhmushësha|gokimabadhmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mabadhmurosha|mabadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomabadhnkmurosha|gomabadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimabadhmurosha|gokimabadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:mabadh|mabadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mæbædh|mæbædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homabadh|homabadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homæbædh|homæbædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomabadh|hohomabadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomæbædh|hohomæbædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nümabadh|nümabadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nümæbædh|nümæbædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünümabadh|nünümabadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünümæbædh|nünümæbædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïmabadh|nïmabadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïmæbædh|nïmæbædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïmabadh|nïnïmabadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïmæbædh|nïnïmæbædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumabadh|lumabadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumæbædh|lumæbædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumabadh|lulumabadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumæbædh|lulumæbædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limabadh|limabadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limæbædh|limæbædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimabadh|lilimabadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimæbædh|lilimæbædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komabadh|komabadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komæbædh|komæbædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomabadh|kokomabadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomæbædh|kokomæbædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemabadh|kemabadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemæbædh|kemæbædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemabadh|kekemabadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemæbædh|kekemæbædh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
